summary: Tested 3 new features: SocialProofSection on homepage, OG meta tags on key pages, and ComplianceLibraryPage data extraction. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features in this batch fully verified: SocialProofSection (4 case studies, auto-rotate, next/prev buttons, dot navigation all work), OG meta tags on /, /program, /standard (og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url, og:site_name, twitter:card all set), /compliance-library loads with products data from libraryData.js. No issues found.

OG meta tags - homepage.og:title: PASS - '90-Day Compliance System for New Motor Carriers | LaunchPath'

OG meta tags - /program.og:title contains 'Enroll': PASS - 'Enroll in the LaunchPath Standard | LaunchPath'
